headline: JioStar Sues Zee As Disney Tests Content Protection In India
summary: JioStar, the joint venture between Walt Disney (NYSE:DIS) and Reliance, has filed legal action against Zee Entertainment in India. The dispute centers on alleged unauthorized broadcasting of Bollywood films for which JioStar holds the rights. The case targets Zee Entertainment’s use of these titles on its Indian broadcast and possibly digital platforms. For you as an investor, this highlights how central India has become to NYSE:DIS, not just for theme parks and consumer products but also...
